problem id: 4c6b2b37
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  00110010 -> 00100100
  10100101 -> 01001011
  00101100 -> 01011000
  11100010 -> 10000101
  00110110 -> 00101100
  01110011 -> 10000110
  11110011 -> 10000111
  00010101 -> 00001010
  11010001 -> 10000011
  01010111 -> 00001110

query: 00010010
predicted answer: 00100100
